description: Add email/password and social authentication to enable multi-device todo sync

userStories.title: Setup authentication database schema and user model
userStories.description: Create database tables for users, sessions, and password reset tokens with required fields and indexes

userStories.title: Implement email/password signup endpoint
userStories.description: Create POST /auth/signup endpoint with email validation, password hashing (bcrypt), and account creation

userStories.title: Implement email/password login endpoint
userStories.description: Create POST /auth/login endpoint with email/password validation and JWT session token generation

userStories.title: Add authentication middleware and protected routes
userStories.description: Create middleware to validate JWT tokens and protect todo routes from unauthenticated access

userStories.title: Implement logout endpoint
userStories.description: Create POST /auth/logout endpoint to invalidate sessions and clear tokens

userStories.title: Build signup UI form
userStories.description: Create signup page with email, password, and confirmation fields with client-side validation

userStories.title: Build login UI form
userStories.description: Create login page with email and password fields with error handling

userStories.title: Implement password reset email flow
userStories.description: Create password reset request and token validation with email notification

userStories.title: Add OAuth2 Google integration
userStories.description: Implement Google OAuth2 sign-up and login flow with account creation

userStories.title: Add account lockout protection
userStories.description: Implement login attempt tracking and temporary account lockout after 5 failed attempts
